AI Application Development

Custom AI apps, built around your business

From idea to production — intelligent applications your team and customers actually love.

Start a project See related work

What this looks like

We design and ship production-grade AI applications tailored to how your business really works — not a one-size-fits-all template.

Tailored to your workflow

AI features designed around your real processes and data.

Production-ready

Secure, scalable, maintainable apps on modern infrastructure.

Idea to launch

Strategy, design, build, and deploy — one partner across the journey.

Typical deliverables

  • Product & UX strategy
  • LLM / agent integration
  • APIs & data pipelines
  • Cloud deployment & monitoring

Skylanex is an independent AI software studio — we design, build, and ship intelligent applications, from custom AI apps to machine learning, NLP, and computer vision.
